moments.title: World Cup Group Stage Finale
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage concludes today, with England playing Panama in a crucial match to secure their knockout spot.

angles.name: England Match Hype
angles.copy: It's the final day of the World Cup group stage and England face Panama! Will the Three Lions roar into the knockouts today?

angles.name: Global Showdown
angles.copy: Group stage drama peaking at the World Cup today! Catch Colombia vs Portugal and Jordan vs Argentina as nations fight for survival. Who are you backing?

moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships begin on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club.

angles.name: Grass Court Buzz
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first aces on Monday. Who's your pick for the trophy this year?

angles.name: London's Tennis Fever
angles.copy: The world's eyes turn to London! Wimbledon is almost here, bringing iconic grass-court action back to the capital. Get ready for Centre Court thrills!

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026, hosted by England, culminates with the final at Lord's on Sunday, July 5.

angles.name: Cricket Showdown
angles.copy: The Women's T20 World Cup final is set for Lord's on July 5th! Who will lift the trophy on home soil?

angles.name: Road to Lord's
angles.copy: Only a few days until the biggest game in women's T20 cricket! The World Cup final is happening at Lord's this Sunday.

moments.title: Formula 1 British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone from July 3rd to 5th, promising high-speed action for motorsport fans.

angles.name: Silverstone Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The F1 British Grand Prix is just around the corner, July 3-5 at Silverstone. Who's taking pole position?

angles.name: Home Grand Prix
angles.copy: Formula 1 is back on home turf next week! The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is always epic. Who are you cheering for?

moments.title: England Men vs India T20Is
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team begins their five-match T20 International series against India on July 1st in Durham.

angles.name: White Ball Action
angles.copy: After the Test match, England switch to white-ball mode! The T20I series against India starts July 1st. Expect fireworks!

angles.name: Durham Cricket Opener
angles.copy: Big week for cricket! The first England vs India T20I kicks off in Durham on Wednesday. Who's heading to cheer them on?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender's 'Rein Me In' featuring Olivia Dean holds strong at UK Number 1 for a 14th non-consecutive week on the Official Singles Chart (chart dated 26/6/2026 - 1/7/2026).

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is Number 1 on the Official Singles Chart for another week. An absolute anthem!

angles.name: Chart Longevity
angles.copy: 14 weeks and counting! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are dominating the charts with 'Rein Me In'. What a track!

moments.title: Shirley Manson turns 60
moments.blurb: Shirley Manson, lead singer of the iconic alternative rock band Garbage, celebrates her 60th birthday today.

angles.name: Garbage Icon
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the incredible Shirley Manson of Garbage! Still rocking, still iconic. What's your favourite Garbage track?

angles.name: Alternative Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 60th to the one and only Shirley Manson! A true force in alternative music.

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and Pussycat Dolls frontwoman Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll Power
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Don't Cha' dance! Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Monday. What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

angles.name: Pop & Dance Queen
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the talented Nicole Scherzinger on Monday! From girl group anthems to solo hits, she's done it all.

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Work It! Wishing a huge Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott on July 1st! A true pioneer in music.

angles.name: Producer Genius
angles.copy: From groundbreaking videos to iconic beats, Missy Elliott is a force. Happy 55th on Wednesday!

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of new wave band Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Debbie Harry on July 1st! The ultimate New Wave icon, still looking 'Picture This' amazing!

angles.name: Music Trailblazer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 81st to the one and only Debbie Harry this Wednesday! Her influence on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Master
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to synth legend Vince Clarke on July 3rd! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, he's crafted so many iconic sounds.

angles.name: Electronic Music Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 66th to Vince Clarke this Friday! His electronic magic defined an era.

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum artist Post Malone, known for blending genres, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Star
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone on July 4th! What's your favourite track from the genre-blending superstar?

angles.name: Modern Music Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a great 31st to Post Malone this Saturday! Constantly pushing boundaries and dropping hits.

moments.title: 50 Cent turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6.

angles.name: Hip Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Wishing a very Happy 51st to the legendary 50 Cent on July 6th. What's your top track from him?

angles.name: Rap Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st to 50 Cent this Monday! From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to G-Unit, a true force in hip-hop.

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer Ringo Starr, best known as a member of The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th to the legendary Ringo Starr this Tuesday! A musical icon whose influence spans decades.
